expectations.text: Recommends a specific versioning tool (Changesets, Lerna, or semantic-release)
expectations.evidence: Recommends Nx Release groups as primary + Changesets as optional overlay

expectations.text: Explains grouped/fixed versioning for coupled packages vs independent for others
expectations.evidence: Clear explanation: 'Group A (ui-stack) => fixed versioning, Group B (independent-libs) => independent versioning'

expectations.text: Provides Changesets config or equivalent showing package grouping
expectations.evidence: Full nx.json release config with ui-stack fixed group AND Changesets config.json with fixed array
Two full GitHub Actions workflows: PR dry-run validation + publish on main/manual
